overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying car navigating through the neon-lit Night City at night. The vehicle weaves through dense urban canyons, flies alongside a cargo airship, lands on a rooftop, and circles a distinctive red tower while surrounded by cyberpunk architecture and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: flying car navigating through narrow corridors between neon-lit skyscrapers at high speed

tall reflective glass building with illuminated windows forming the canyon walls
curved elevated roadway with moving traffic visible below the flying car

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a flying car speeding through a narrow urban canyon between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. Neon holographic billboards in pink and yellow illuminate the scene from both sides, while the glass facades of the buildings reflect the city lights. The camera follows closely behind the vehicle as it navigates the tight corridor, with elevated highways visible below.

flying car approaches and flies alongside the massive cargo airship DT&R

agents.ego_description: flying car maneuvering over highway interchanges and flying parallel to the massive cargo airship

large illuminated white sign reading North Oak on hillside
complex multi-level highway interchange with moving traffic
tall red and white communications tower with blinking lights

segments.scene_description: The flying car emerges from the dense canyon into a wide-open area featuring a complex highway interchange below. A massive cargo airship labeled DT&R enters from the left, flying parallel to the car. The North Oak sign is visible on a hillside to the right, and a tall transmission tower stands in the distance against the night sky.

illuminated rooftop swimming pool with blue water

segments.scene_description: Leaving the cargo ship behind, the flying car descends toward a residential district with apartment blocks and palm trees. The vehicle lands on a rooftop helipad near a swimming pool, drives briefly across the roof, then takes off again to continue the flight over the city.

tall commercial buildings covered in neon advertisements and holograms

segments.scene_description: The car flies through a dense commercial district filled with towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. A large samurai billboard dominates the right side while the Hydro Subsidium sign glows red on the left. Toward the end of the segment, a distinctive red cylindrical tower becomes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the distinctive red cylindrical tower as the flying car circles it closely. The environment is a dense urban core with skyscrapers forming narrow canyons on both sides. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements cover every surface as the car navigates the tight spaces around the tower, with the building's red lights glowing prominently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a vast cityscape before descending into a residential district. It begins by trailing a flying car as it speeds through a narrow corridor of towering skyscrapers, where pink and yellow holographic billboards reflect off glass facades. As the vehicle emerges from the dense architecture, the scene opens into a wide expanse featuring a complex highway interchange and a massive DT&R cargo airship flying in parallel. The camera then follows the car as it leaves the airship behind and descends toward a residential area filled with apartment blocks and palm trees. Finally, the vehicle touches down on a rooftop helipad beside a swimming pool before taking off once more to soar over the city.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a neon-drenched commercial district that culminates in a close orbit around a towering red landmark. It begins by weaving through a dense canyon of skyscrapers, passing a massive samurai billboard on the right and the red glow of a Hydro Subsidium sign on the left. As the vehicle pushes forward, the perspective shifts to reveal a distinctive red cylindrical tower emerging in the distance. The scene then tightens as the car enters the urban core, navigating narrow gaps between buildings covered in holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera circles the red tower closely, weaving through the tight architectural spaces of the city center under the prominence of the building's glowing red lights.
